subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: All internal heated water outlets (such as taps, showers and washing machine water supply fittings) must be connected to a heated water system or a recirculating heated water system with pipes installed and insulated in accordance with AS/NZS 3500: Plumbing and Drainage, Part 4 Heated Water Services.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The pipe from the heated water system or recirculating heated water system to the furthest heated water outlet must not be more than 20 m in length or 2 litres of internal volume.
